summary: Iteration 114 - ARS 1000 Module Testing COMPLETE. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Cooperative ARS 1000 Dashboard with 5 tabs (Certification, PDC, Traçabilité, Agroforesterie, Registres) working. Farmer PDC form with 7 steps working. Navigation from Quick Actions working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: ars1000_pdc.py was missing 'producteur' in user_type checks - added 'producteur' to create_pdc and update_pdc functions
All ARS 1000 APIs working correctly with MongoDB storage
Quality control thresholds correctly implemented: humidity max 8%, sieving max 1.5%, foreign bodies max 0.75%
Certification levels correctly calculated: Bronze (38%/78%), Argent (90%/100%), Or (100%/100%)
PDC conformity percentage auto-calculated from filled fields
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix: PDC, Lots, Arbres Ombrage, Non-Conformités, Réclamations, Risques
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 module fully implemented and tested. Key fix: added 'producteur' to user_type checks in ars1000_pdc.py. All endpoints working: PDC CRUD, Lots/Traceability, Certification dashboard, Agroforestry. Frontend pages: /cooperative/ars1000 (5 tabs), /farmer/pdc (7 steps). Quick Actions navigation working.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - PASSED: All 3 roles (cooperative, farmer, agent)
GET /api/ars1000/pdc/my-pdc - PASSED: Farmer gets their PDC
GET /api/ars1000/pdc/cooperative/all - PASSED: List all cooperative PDCs
POST /api/ars1000/pdc/{id}/submit - PASSED: Submit PDC for validation
POST /api/ars1000/lots - PASSED: Create lot with quality controls
frontend_ui: 5 tabs present (Certification, PDC, Traçabilité, Agroforesterie, Registres) - PASSED
Certification tab shows conformity levels and KPIs - PASSED
PDC tab shows list and stats - PASSED
Lots tab shows lots with quality scores and create form - PASSED
Agroforesterie tab shows tree stats and conformity - PASSED
Registres tab shows NC, Réclamations, Risques - PASSED

bug_fix_applied.issue: Farmer with user_type='producteur' was getting 403 'Non autorisé' when creating PDC
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Code only checked for 'farmer' and 'planteur' user types, not 'producteur'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'producteur' to user_type checks in create_pdc (line 239) and update_pdc (line 321)
